meta.title: Lessons from the Ukraine Crisis with Rep. Jason Crow
meta.description:
What should the U.S. and NATO do to deter Russian aggression? Could the Ukraine crisis have been prevented? How can we best work to promote stability and democracy in Ukraine as a bulwark against future Russian aggression? Please join Hudson Institute for a conversation with Congressman Jason Crow (D-CO), a decorated Army Ranger who served in Iraq and Afghanistan and now serves on both the House Armed Services Committee and the Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence.

Watch on Hudson.org: https://www.hudson.org/events/2068-virtual-event-lessons-from-the-ukraine-crisis-with-rep-jason-crow-22022
